name: British Bangers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the fresh pork into approximately 1 inch cubes and chill for 1 hour.
2. Pass through the coarse plate of the meat grinder.
3. Add remaining ingredients and grind a second time through the fine (1/4 inch) plate.
4. Stuff into casings and twist into 4 inch lengths.
Makes 20 to 24 lengths.
Variations:
Cambridge Style Sausage: Use 2 cups boiled rice instead of fresh breadcrumbs, and add 1/4 teaspoon ground red pepper and 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger to the spice mixture.
Oxford Style Sausage: Substitute 1 pound veal for 1 pound pork. Omit mace and coriander, using 1/4 teaspoon each dried thyme and marjoram instead. Add 1 teaspoon dried sage.
